ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Southwest, Northeast) */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the media channel (e.g., Social Media, TV) */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of media channel (e.g., Digital, Broadcast) */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the media channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the media channel */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement metric (e.g., Stories, Posts, Spots) */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the engagement metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement metric */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions for the engagement metric */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks for the engagement metric */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions for the engagement metric */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate for the engagement metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES media_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_engagement" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total engagement record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "total_value" INTEGER /* Total engagement value across all channels */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the total engagement */,
  "total_impressions" INTEGER /* Total impressions across all channels */,
  "total_clicks" INTEGER /* Total clicks across all channels */,
  "total_conversions" INTEGER /* Total conversions across all channels */,
  "total_engagement_rate" REAL /* Total engagement rate across all channels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_engagement_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., marketing manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., marketing, sales, IT) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engagement metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_source" TEXT /* Source of the access (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES engagement_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the campaign is run */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the media channel used in the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the campaign (e.g., brand awareness, product launch) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign (e.g., age, interests) */,
  "target_devices" TEXT /* Target devices for the campaign (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES media_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content */,
  "content_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., image, video, text) */,
  "content_url" TEXT /* URL of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_content" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "content_order" INTEGER /* Order of the content in the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id", "content_id")
)
